:project_name: EditAccount
:project_type: mediawiki
:phan:
= {project_name}

image:https://github.com/gesinn-it-pub/EditAccount/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg[CI,link=https://github.com/gesinn-it-pub/EditAccount/actions/workflows/ci.yml]
image:https://codecov.io/gh/gesinn-it-pub/EditAccount/branch/master/graph/badge.svg[Codecov,link=https://app.codecov.io/gh/gesinn-it-pub/EditAccount]

Enables privileged users to manage user account information directly from the wiki — resetting passwords, changing e-mail addresses, real names, and disabling accounts.

* Website: https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:EditAccount
* License: GPL-2.0-or-later

== Installation

Place the +EditAccount+ directory within your MediaWiki +extensions+ directory, then add the following to +LocalSettings.php+:

[source,php]
----
wfLoadExtension( 'EditAccount' );
----

== Usage

The extension provides two special pages:

* +Special:EditAccount+ — for privileged users (requires the +editaccount+ right); allows searching for any user and editing their e-mail address, password, real name, or disabling their account.
* +Special:CloseAccount+ — for regular registered users; allows a user to close (disable) their own account.

=== Permissions

The +editaccount+ right is granted to the +staff+ group by default. To grant it to other groups, add the following to +LocalSettings.php+:

[source,php]
----
$wgGroupPermissions['sysop']['editaccount'] = true;
----
